info.description: Notification service providing management and sending capabilities for multiple notification channels such as email, SMS, and push notifications.
info.title: Notification Service API

post.description: Create a new announcement, supporting draft/scheduled publishing, with the ability to specify target tenants and roles. Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.

put.description: Edit a specified announcement (editable only in draft status). Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.

delete.description: Delete a specified announcement (deletable only in draft status). Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.

post.description: Publish an announcement from draft/scheduled status to published, pushing notifications to target users. Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.
Withdraw a published announcement back to draft status (unpublish). Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.

get.description: Admin queries notification history for a specified user by user_id, supporting filtering by type, read status, and date range.

post.description: Send notification messages to all users under a tenant or a specified user group, suitable for system maintenance notifications, security alerts, etc. Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.
Create a mapping relationship between event types and notification templates. Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.

put.description: Update the event mapping configuration for a specified ID. Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.

delete.description: Delete the event mapping for a specified ID. Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.

post.description: Create tenant/application-level global variables (e.g., brand name, support email). Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.

put.description: Update the value of a global variable for a specified ID. Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.

delete.description: Delete the global variable for a specified ID. Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.

get.description: Retrieve aggregated notification statistics (sends, reads, etc.) for all tenants on the platform. Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.

put.description: Admin sets notification channel preferences (email/SMS/Push, etc.) for a specified user.

post.description: Create a new notification template for sending notifications based on the template. Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.

put.description: Update the content of a notification template for a specified ID. Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.

delete.description: Delete the notification template for a specified ID. Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.

post.description: Copy a specified template to a target locale for internationalization support. Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.

get.description: Paginated query of announcement list, supporting filtering by status and keyword search. Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.
Get detailed information of a specified announcement, including read statistics (views/dismissals). Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.
Get read/delivery statistics for a specified announcement. Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.

post.description: Export all notification records and preference settings by tenant and user ID (GDPR-compliant data export). Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.
Erase all notification data for a specified user according to the compliance-service erasure flow. Internal API, protected by InternalAPIKeyMulti.
Internal API to send notification to a specified user based on event type. Protected by InternalAPIKeyMulti + ExtractTenantFromHeaderStrict.

parameters.description: Event Notification Request {event_type:string, user_id:string, variables:map, metadata:map}
parameters.name: request

post.description: Send VAPID-signed Web Push notification message to a specified user's device (internal API). Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.
Internal API called by seed script to create a template by passing template title, locale, etc. in the request body. Protected by InternalAPIKeyMulti.

get.description: Return service runtime information, including scheduler status, version, uptime, etc. (internal API). Protected by InternalAPIKeyMulti.
Query the current user's received notification list, supporting filtering by unread only. Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.

post.description: Send a notification message to a specified user, supporting multiple notification types, recording send status and triggering event notifications. Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.

get.description: Get the list of all event mappings for the current tenant. Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.
Get details of a specified event mapping by ID. Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.
Get the list of all global variables for the current tenant. Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.
Get details of a specified global variable by ID. Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.
Get notification receiving preferences for a specified user, including channel toggles, do-not-disturb periods, etc. Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.

put.description: Update notification receiving preferences for a specified user, including toggles for in-app, email, SMS, push, etc. Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.

get.description: Trust Center public endpoint. Users call this endpoint after clicking the confirmation link in the email to complete subscription confirmation. Requires email and token parameters. Protected by IP-level rate limiting.

post.description: Trust Center: Public subscription to security bulletins and compliance updates (no authentication). Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.
Trust Center: Public unsubscription from security bulletins (no authentication). Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.

put.description: Mark all unread notifications of the current user as read at once. Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.

get.description: Calculate read count, unread count, read rate, and other operational metrics based on real notification records in the database. Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.

post.description: Compatibility endpoint with same functionality as /notifications, sends notification to specified user. Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.

Send the same notification message to multiple users simultaneously, suitable for system announcements, operational activities, etc. Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.
Send notification to user using a specified template, supporting template variable substitution. Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.

get.description: Get aggregated statistics of notification sending, delivery, and reading for the current tenant. Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.
Push notifications in real-time via Server-Sent Events. The client must pass the user_id query parameter to subscribe. Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.
Get a list of all notification templates, with an option to include disabled templates. Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.
Return an aggregated list of platform default templates and custom templates for this tenant. Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.
Get details of a notification template by ID. Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.

post.description: Send a test notification to the specified channel and target, creating a test notification record in the database to verify the notification service configuration. Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.

get.description: Return trend data of daily notification sent and read counts within the specified number of days. Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.
Get a list of all unread notifications for the current user. Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.
Get the count of unread notifications and the time of the last notification for the current user. Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.
Get detailed information of a specified notification.

delete.description: Delete a notification record by ID (soft validation of user ID match). Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.

put.description: Mark a specified notification as read, recording the read time. Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.
Mark a specified notification as unread. Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.

get.description: Query the current user's Web Push subscription list. Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.

post.description: Register a Web Push subscription (RFC 8030 VAPID) to receive push notifications. Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.

delete.description: Delete a Web Push subscription by endpoint. Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.

get.description: Get Web Push subscription details by ID.
Return the Web Push VAPID public key for the frontend to use when registering a push subscription. Reference: CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. §7701) — Commercial Email Compliance.

content.example: The system will undergo upgrade maintenance on 2026-05-15
Your account has been successfully upgraded

dto.BroadcastNotificationRequest.description: Request parameters for broadcasting notification to all tenants

content.example: The system will undergo maintenance tonight from 22:00 to 23:00
The system will undergo maintenance tonight from 22:00 to 23:00
The system will undergo upgrade maintenance on 2026-05-15
Your account has been successfully upgraded

dto.NotificationStatsResponse.description: Notification send and read statistics (notification layer does not track delivery status, only read/unread)

dto.SendFromTemplateRequest.description: Send notification using template request parameters

aggregation_key.description: Aggregation key (notifications with the same key are aggregated into one)

content.example: Your account has been successfully upgraded

dto.UpdateAnnouncementRequest.description: Update announcement request parameters (only editable in draft status)

dto.UpdateTemplateRequest.description: Update notification template request parameters (all fields optional)

dto.VapidPublicKeyResponse.description: Web Push VAPID public key, used by the frontend when registering a push subscription

has_next.description: HasNext indicates whether there is a next page

has_prev.description: HasPrev indicates whether there is a previous page

page.description: Page is the current page number (1-based)

page_size.description: PageSize is the number of items per page

total.description: Total is the total number of items across all pages

total_pages.description: TotalPages is the total number of pages

bearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
bearerAuth.name: Authorization

tags.description: Notification management: templates, sending, delivery tracking
tags.name: Notification Service

tags.description: Public trust center: security status, compliance certificates, documents
tags.name: Trust Center
